        "articles": [
            {
                "id": 48026709,
                "nowId": "1-48026709",
                "contentKey": "48026709-1-5-1",
                "dataSourceIdentifier": "a84c21ab6022b",
                "type": "HeadlineNews",
                "headline": "Indianapolis Colts 'positive' on deals for QB Jones, WR Pierce",
                "description": "Indianapolis Colts general manager Chris Ballard said he remains hopeful that the team can get deals done with receiver Alec Pierce and quarterback Daniel Jones before free agency begins.",
                "lastModified": "2026-02-25T00:52:58Z",
                "published": "2026-02-25T00:52:58Z",
                "images": [
                    {
                        "dataSourceIdentifier": "0e7c24bf0c649",
                        "id": 47100295,
                        "type": "header",
                        "name": "Daniel Jones [1296x729]",
                        "caption": "Daniel Jones will need his early season form to guide the Colts through a rugged schedule.",
                        "credit": "Denny Medley/Imagn Images",
                        "height": 729,
                        "width": 1296,
                        "url": "https://a.espncdn.com/photo/2025/1125/r1580744_1296x729_16-9.jpg"
                    }
                ],

            {
                "id": 48026679,
                "nowId": "1-48026679",
                "contentKey": "48026679-1-5-1",
                "dataSourceIdentifier": "a4df53e2f0d59",
                "type": "HeadlineNews",
                "headline": "John Lynch optimistic 49ers, Trent Williams can reach deal",
                "description": "Shortly after ESPN's Adam Schefter reported Tuesday that left tackle Trent Williams and the 49ers are \"struggling to find a contractual solution,\" general manager John Lynch offered a more optimistic perspective.",
                "lastModified": "2026-02-25T01:34:42Z",
                "published": "2026-02-25T01:34:42Z",
                "images": [
                    {
                        "dataSourceIdentifier": "684616880afc1",
                        "id": 48026639,
                        "type": "header",
                        "name": "John Lynch [600x400]",
                        "credit": "Michael Conroy/AP",
                        "height": 400,
                        "width": 600,

                        "id": 48026587,
                        "type": "header",
                        "name": "Trent Williams [600x400]",
                        "caption": "Trent Williams, who will turn 38 in July, has told ESPN he’d like to play until he’s 40, which would mean any deal he and the 49ers work out could be with an eye toward 2026 and 2027.\n\n",

                "description": "The Cowboys have extended an offer to Brandon Aubrey that would make him the highest-paid kicker in the NFL, sources told ESPN, but Aubrey's agent has asked for a deal closer to $10 million per season.",

                "headline": "Jets GM: We'll find a way to keep Breece here if we can't get a deal done",
                "description": "Jets general manager Darren Mougey says New York will continue to work on a deal with Breece Hall and plans on using a tag if no deal is reached.",
